comments: Approved. The drafted contract remains tightly bounded to the V0.8-M5 objective: producing a custom example workflow artifact (custom-deploy-pipeline.yaml) and documenting the Team Mode Git Dual-Tiered Synchronization protocol in the English and Chinese collaboration documentation, with allowance for a dedicated companion doc if needed. It does not broaden scope into runtime sync infrastructure or unrelated platform changes. The out_of_scope section correctly and explicitly forbids realtime WebSocket or database synchronization engines, legacy Python tooling deprecation work assigned to M6, and workflow state semantic changes outside standard M5 progression. The allowed file list is narrow and consistent with a documentation-plus-example-workflow deliverable. Minor note: the recon packet discusses custom workflow authoring conceptually under .agent-state/workflows/ while the contract fixes the deliverable path at templates/workflows/custom-deploy-pipeline.yaml; this is a deliverable-location clarification rather than a scope expansion, so the contract still preserves the intended M5 boundary.
